sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14707" key="a)ra/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀράσιμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ρᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀράομαι</etym>) <sense id="n14707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accursed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
